# AIDLA

> AIDLA (Artificial Intelligence Digital Learning Academy) is a Pakistan-based online learning platform offering free courses, AI tools, study resources, quizzes, AIDLA Coins, rewards, CV tools, cover letters, and career support.

Founder: Engineer Muhammad Zubair Afridi, Gold Medalist Electrical Engineer, PEC registered Electrical Engineer (ELECT/109809), founder of AIDLA, alumnus of Sarhad University Peshawar.

Mission: make practical education, AI learning, and career tools accessible to students, job seekers, freshers, career switchers, and lifelong learners.

- [Homepage](https://www.aidla.online/)
- [About](https://www.aidla.online/about)
- [Courses](https://www.aidla.online/courses)

- [Login](https://www.aidla.online/login)
- [Signup](https://www.aidla.online/signup)
- [Careers](https://www.aidla.online/careers)
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.aidla.online/privacy-policy)
- [Terms](https://www.aidla.online/terms)

## Free Tools

- [AI Text Summarizer](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/summarizer)
- [AI Paraphraser](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/paraphraser)
- [AI Email Writer](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/email-writer)
- [AI Interview Prep](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/interview-prep)
- [AI LinkedIn Bio Generator](https://www.aidla.online/tools/ai/linkedin-bio)
- [Free CV Maker](https://www.aidla.online/tools/career/cv-maker)
- [Cover Letter Maker](https://www.aidla.online/tools/career/cover-letter-maker)

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2026
- Founder: Muhammad Zubair Afridi
- Founder credentials: Gold Medalist Electrical Engineer; PEC registered; Sarhad University Peshawar alumnus
- Country: Pakistan
- Languages: English, Urdu
- Price: Free
- Topics: AI learning, Pakistan EdTech, online courses, quizzes, career tools, CV writing, cover letters, study resources
